verify.comment: Whole-tree ruff gate + full pytest suite at merge (#633, from #628; pytest added #764). cwd=worktree has no .venv (repo convention), and neither `ruff` nor `python` is on PATH there; `git rev-parse --git-common-dir` resolves the MAIN repo's .venv/bin depth-independently while `pycats/` stays relative to the worktree cwd (checks the code being merged). Ruff runs first so a formatting/lint failure short-circuits before the slow suite; pytest last runs the whole suite under the SDL dummy drivers so a broken test blocks the merge (#757→#762: a red test previously merged green-gated because the gate was ruff-only). Ruff `check` (lint) covers pycats/ + tests/ (#817 widened it — a tests/ F401 rotted undetected because the lint gate was pycats/-only); `format --check` stays pycats/-only until a separate call reformats the never-formatted tests/ tree (#540/#817 deferred). pytest is whole-suite.
